chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 358 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case. 1) For orders on CMA No. 304/17 (Exemption) 2) For hearing of main case. -------------- 20.05.2025 None present nor any intimation received. Whereas, on 05.11.2019 the following order was passed:- “Counsel for applicant is called absent, no intimation is received. Record shows that instant Reference Application was present on 09.09.2016, thereafter, matter is fixed in Court after lapse of more than three years’, whereas, counsel for the applicant is called absent. It has been informed that Mr. Muhammad Sarfaraz Ali Metlo, advocate has returned the brief to the department, however, no intimation in the instant matter is available in record. As an indulgence, we are adjourning this matter for a date to be fixed after four weeks’. Let direct notice be issued to applicant department for next date, who shall make some alternate arrangement, failing which, instant Reference Application may be dismissed for non-prosecution. Today, nobody has turned up to assist the Court. In view of such position, this Reference Application is dismissed for non- prosecution with pending application(s). ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz
